session.user:
Update the file /home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/app/test_actions.py:
1. Add this import line after the existing FakePlanDataProvider import: `from erk_shared.gateway.plan_service.fake import FakePlanService`
2. For EVERY `ErkDashApp(` constructor call in the file, add `service=FakePlanService()` as a keyword argument. The pattern is: - Old: `ErkDashApp(provider=provider, filters=filters, refresh_interval=0)` - New: `ErkDashApp(provider=provider, service=FakePlanService(), filters=filters, refresh_interval=0)`
Read the file first, then make all needed edits. Be thorough and update EVERY ErkDashApp constructor call in the file.

session.assistant:
Perfect! All updates have been successfully completed. Here's a summary of the changes made to `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/app/test_actions.py`:
## Changes Summary
### 1. Added Import Added the `FakePlanService` import on line 12: ```python from erk_shared.gateway.plan_service.fake import FakePlanService ```
### 2. Updated All ErkDashApp Constructor Calls Updated all 9 `ErkDashApp` constructor calls in the file to include `service=FakePlanService()` as a keyword argument:
- Line 23: `test_no_selected_row_does_nothing` (TestActionViewComments) - Line 43: `test_no_pr_linked_shows_status_message` - Line 62: `test_zero_unresolved_shows_status_message` - Line 81: `test_unresolved_comments_pushes_screen` - Line 103: `test_launch_with_no_selected_row_does_nothing` (TestActionLaunch) - Line 131: `test_launch_pushes_launch_screen` - Line 153: `test_launch_result_none_does_not_execute_command` - Line 172: `test_launch_result_executes_command` - Line 198: `test_launch_screen_dismisses_on_unmapped_key`
All constructor calls now follow the pattern: ```python app = ErkDashApp(provider=provider, service=FakePlanService(), filters=filters, refresh_interval=0) ```
The file has been successfully updated with all required changes.
